# Digital Humanities Handbook instructions

Preserve the bilingual MkDocs architecture (`docs/en`, `docs/sl`) and the distinction between the stable handbook core and the living workflow library. Pair all chapter and learning-path edits across English and Slovene. New workflows must follow the existing front matter and answer one reproducible question. Include expected output, validation checks, common failure modes, accessibility, ethics, rights and data provenance where relevant. Keep code blocks language-neutral and testable. Run `make check` before finalizing a change.
